sentiment.reasoning: A 3% margin improvement directly signals increased profitability and operational efficiency.

sentiment.reasoning: Industry awards are positive for reputation but have limited direct impact on financial performance.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
